meta.title: PAS - OT Forensics and Safe Restart
meta.description:
Mark Carrigan of PAS presents Mind The Gap: Understand the Distance Between IT & OT Cyber Incident Forensic Analysis and Safe Restart.

He begins with an overview of the IT / OT differences and then provides a detailed example of inserted code attack on a Honeywell Controller. An attack that IT forensics would not find. 

Mark continues with what is required in OT Forensics and a brief overview of PAS and their Cyber Integrity project. The last 10+ minutes of this session are Q&A on the attack example and detecting changes deep in an ICS.
